title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences

Announcements

Fall Term English Exemption and Placement Exam

22
						September

2021

For our Russian, Chinese, and Arabic Translation and Interpreting students, the English Exemption and Placement Exam will be held

ONLINE on Wednesday, September 29 at 10:00

. The students will access the exam by entering their username and password from the link given to them by the department heads.

The English Exemption and Placement Exam consists of two parts. In the first part, there will be a multiple-choice test that measures English grammar and vocabulary. In the second part, there will be an article writing section that will measure the writing skills of our students, in which they will write only one of the two questions. Grammar and vocabulary tests will affect the total grade by 50% and the article writing section by 50%. Our students will either be exempted according to their total grades or placed in classes according to their scores.

We wish success to all our students who will take the exam.

English Translation and Interpreting  Head of Department
